extortion.description: Carrington GroupFor over 40 years the Carrington Group has prided itself on adapting to the changing Edmonton market by offering new housing products to suit the needs of our customers. Continuing on this tradition of growth, Carrington Group has diversified into other sectors.Headquarters 5530 Schonsee Dr NW, Edmonton, Alberta, T5Z 0T6, CanadaPhone Number (780) 439-5000Website www.carrington.caRevenue $70M
